title: Lortan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:ReslianPurge-XWingRogueSquadron25.jpg]] |name=Lortan
{{C|left}} |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Lorta/Legends|Lorta]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} The '''Lortans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Lorta/Legends|Lorta]]. They were known to be violent and expansionist. ==History== The group believed that someday a Man-[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] would sweep evil from [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Approximately ten years prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] they sent a battle fleet into twelve systems and virtually wiped out every planet, including the [[Jiroch system/Legends|Jiroch system]], in a genocide known as the [[Reslian Purge]]. The Lortans were finally stopped by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in a series of battles in which [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] participated. {{Species-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030130jtptan|text=J't'p'tan: Temples and Tybis}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' [[Category:Mid Rim sentient species]]
